title: struthiopteris rigida
intro: Struthiopteris rigida, also known as the rigid fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of aquatic ferns. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its fumaric acid and other compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating skin conditions, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to its potential side effects.
